description:
You are the Office Manager at Northwind Traders. The financial year 2024 has ended, and you need to secure the data and update document standards for 2025. Set the system Lock Date to 31/12/2024 to prevent changes to past records. Additionally, update the Sales Invoices Form Defaults footer to include the following 2025 payment terms:

Payment Terms: Net 15 Days.
Bank: First National Bank
Account: 555-0199
Thank you for your business!

Payment Terms: Net 15 Days.
Bank: First National Bank
Account: 555-0199
